title: atriplex patula var. erecta
intro: Atriplex patula var. erecta, also known as Orach, is a perennial plant belonging to the Amaranthaceae family, commonly found in temperate and subtropical regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Orach include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, and provide antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Orach can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by drying and crushing the leaves to make a capsule or supplement.
